<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

ctx.up carries control/demand tiers only (R-ctx-up / D269): DIRTY, PAUSE, RESUME, PULL,
INVALIDATE, TEARDOWN. DATA/RESOLVED (tier 3) and COMPLETE/ERROR (tier 5) are
down-only.

## Import

```ts
import { isUpAllowed } from "@graphrefly/ts/core";
```

## Signature

```ts
function isUpAllowed(t: MessageType): boolean
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `t` | `MessageType` | t value used by the helper. |

## Returns

`true` when the value matches the expected shape.

## Example

```ts
import { isUpAllowed } from "@graphrefly/ts/core";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/protocol/messages.ts`
